creator: devin@sevenlayer.studio
text:
On Tue, 29 Jul 2008, chinsan wrote:
 
 >> Originator:	chinsan
 >> Synopsis:	[PATCH] graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool: update to 7.37
 >> Class:		update
 >> Description:
 > - Update to 7.37
 
 Hi,
 
 Thanks for this update PR, but I have always maintained the policy that 
 graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool should track the latest production release of 
 ExifTool.
 
 According to http://www.sno.phy.queensu.ca/~phil/exiftool/history.html the 
 current production release is 7.30.  Accordingly, I would like to keep 
 graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool at version 7.30 until Phil Harvey designates 
 the next production release.
 
 If you require a port for 7.37 or another development release, I would 
 suggest creating a new port, graphics/p5-Image-Exiftool-devel which can 
 track more recent development releases.
 
 Thanks,
 -- 
 Tod McQuillin
 p5-Image-ExifTool port maintainer
